mapper.select: select id, name, sort, status, create_time, update_time from category order by sort asc, id desc
select id, name, sort, status, create_time, update_time from category where id = #{id}
select id, name, sort, status, create_time, update_time from category where name = #{name} limit 1
mapper.insert: insert into category (name, sort, status, create_time, update_time) values (#{name}, #{sort}, #{status}, now(), now())
mapper.update: update category set name = #{name}, sort = #{sort}, status = #{status}, update_time = now() where id = #{id}
